title: Yonah #3124
definition:
Jonah = "dove"

 1) son of Amittai and a native of Gath-hepher; 5th of the minor
    prophets who prophesied during the reign of Jeroboam II and whom
    God sent also to prophecy to Nineveh
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jonah = "dove"

 1) son of Amittai and a native of Gath-hepher; 5th of the minor
    prophets who prophesied during the reign of Jeroboam II and whom
    God sent also to prophecy to Nineveh

    NASB:  an Isr. prophet
